items.text:
🦖✨ THE ROARSOME DINO ADVENTURE IS COMING! ✨🦖

Step back in time for a Jurassic day of roar-some fun at The Grand! Join our friendly dinosaur palaeontologists and explore a prehistoric world packed with adventure, discovery, and dino magic!

Get creative with Dino mask making, dig for ancient treasures in the Dino fossil dig, and train to become a top explorer in Roar ranger training! Then enjoy the thrilling Dino show before dancing the day away at the Dino disco 🪩🦖

Meet our giant prehistoric friends up close in the magical Dinos meet and greet, and don’t forget to capture the moment at our photo opportunity!

📅 Sunday 12th July
📍 The Grand
💷 £10 per person

⏰ Session Times:
11:00am – 1:30pm
3:00pm – 5:30pm

A roar-some family adventure you won’t want to miss! 🌿🦖✨

items.text:
Hey everyone! My name is Hannah and I’m on the casting team for a new short film, PRESTO, that is currently looking for CHILD VIOLIN PLAYERS who appear around 7-10 YEARS OLD.

For the speaking roles, THIS IS A PAID OPPORTUNITY! NO ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED, JUST VIOLIN PROFICIENCY!

SHOOT DATES: 3 days between JULY 16th-
19th.

Location: Vancouver, BC

All details are below. 

If you are a good fit and interested in applying, please email: prestoshortfilm@gmail.com

Also, if you happen to have any potential leads as to where I should look or know anyone who should apply, feel free to DM me. Thank you!

Perfection or death. Union Status: UBCP ULB Callback Dates: TBD Shoot: 3 days between July 16-79 2026 Director: Adam Kirschner Producers: Lucy McNulty, Alison Almeida, Ariel Bond, Lauren Jackson Actor (Lead): Alex Rose Casting: Taylor Long & &Hannah Carman'

REQUIREMENTS: Violin Proficiency NO AC ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED YOUNG JACK ACTOR) $100 CADA AGE: APPEARS 7-10 ETHNICITY: CAUCASIAN DESCRIPTION: Younger version of our lead. REQUIREMENTS: Violin proficiency NO ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED To submit, please email: prestoshortfilm@gmail.com'

items.text: Bardzo proszę o wsparcie i udostępnianie

sharedPost.text:
💔 Sławek przez lata był herosem dla swoich dzieci. Dzisiaj to on potrzebuje ratunku!

Link do zbiórki 👉 https://www.mammoc.pl/slawomir-wojewodzki 

🔸 Kiedy poznał swoją żonę Sławek był wdowcem samotnie wychowującym małe dzieci. Jego pierwszą żonę zabrał nowotwór. Od tamtej pory całkowicie oddany dzieciom, bez czasu na własną żałobę czy chwile słabości. Robił wszystko, by zapewnić im bezpieczny byt. 

🔸 Gdy los połączył go z nową partnerką, stworzyli dom pełen ciepła. Sławek stał się prawdziwym filarem codzienności. Człowiekiem "orkiestrą", dla którego rodzina zawsze była na pierwszym miejscu.

🔸 Początek czerwca przyniósł dramat, na który nikt z nich nie był gotowy. Sławek spadł z drabiny. W wyniku urazu głowy doszło do ciężkiego uszkodzenia mózgu, a lekarze określili jego stan jako krytyczny. Świat rodziny runął w sekundę.

🔸 Sławek to jednak wojownik o ogromnej woli życia. Niedawno wydarzył się pierwszy cud – otworzył oczy! Choć lekarze wciąż nie są w stanie powiedzieć co będzie dalej, rodzina się nie podda.

🔸 Przed nim długa, niezwykle intensywna i koszmarnie droga rehabilitacja neurologiczna. Koszty specjalistycznych ośrodków i terapii wielokrotnie przekraczają możliwości finansowe rodziny.

📣 Wszyscy czekają na niego z ogromnym utęsknieniem. Dzieci potrzebują taty, a żona ukochanego męża i przyjaciela. Każda wpłata, udostępnienie i dobre słowo przybliżają Sławka do powrotu do domu. Dziękujemy za każde wsparcie! Wspólnie możemy uratować tego herosa.

Jak możesz pomóc ⤵️?
📱 BLIK: 512 773 649 w treści: Sławomir Wojewódzki 
💳 Przelew: 16 1020 5226 0000 6602 0635 0765 Tytuł: Sławomir Wojewódzki 
📦 Licytacje: Licytacje Pełne Mocy

items.title: Bardzo proszę o wsparcie i udostępnianie

items.text:
Poszukujemy Epizodystów/Aktorów — chłopca w wieku około 6-7 lat oraz i mężczyzny w wieku 30-45 lat do roli Taty do krótkiego 30-sekundowego spotu piłkarskiego do social mediów w Warszawie.

Role przedstawiają się następująco:

- Mały chłopiec (ok. 6-7 lat) w koszulce ulubionej drużyny ogląda mecz. Po meczu mówi tacie (ok. 37-40 lat):

- „Tato, chciałbym grać tak jak ona.” Ojciec patrzy z uśmiechem. Zbliżenie na ekran – zawodniczka strzela gola.

1. Zdjęcia w Warszawie ul. Domaniowska (termin do uzgodnienia)

2. Prawa: Social media na czas nieokreślony.

3. Wynagrodzenie: 600 zł netto/osoba (płatne w ciągu 1 dnia po planie zdjęciowym — BLIK/Konto bankowe).

W razie zainteresowania, spełnienia wymagań, prosimy o wysłanie zgłoszenia, podając następujące informację. (Wysyłając zgłoszenie dziecka, prosimy o podanie danych dziecka a danych kontaktowych do rodzica).

1. Imię i nazwisko

2. Rok urodzenia

3. Miasto zamieszkania

4. Telefon kontaktowy

5. Adres e-mail

6. Wzrost

8. Link do profilu na Facebooku

9. Krótki opis dotychczasowego doświadczenia

10. Mile widziana wizytówka video (link na YouTube)

11. Minimum trzy zdjęcia

Kontakt: rekrutacja@agencjainfernal.pl

W temacie wiadomości prosimy napisać: Spot piłkarski

Wysłanie zgłoszenie jest jednoznaczne z wyrażeniem zgody na przetwarzanie danych osobowych w celu udziału w spocie piłkarskim zgodnie z Rozporządzeniem Parlamentu Europejskiego i Rady (UE) 2016/679 z dnia 27 kwietnia 2016 r. w sprawie ochrony osób fizycznych w związku z przetwarzaniem danych osobowych i w sprawie swobodnego przepływu takich danych oraz uchylenia dyrektywy 95/46/WE (ogólne rozporządzenie o ochronie danych). Administratorem Twoich danych osobowych pozyskanych w procesie rekrutacyjnym jest Agencja Artystyczna INFERNAL. Podanie danych jest dobrowolne, w każdej chwili przysługuje Ci prawo do wglądu do danych, ich poprawiania lub usunięcia. Kontakt do administratora rekrutacja@agencjainfernal.pl.

Zgłoszenia wraz ze zdjęciem proszę nadsyłać na sfilmowa@gmail.com lub w wiadomości prywatnej.
Przewidywany czas na planie maksymalnie 4 godziny.
items.title: Płatne!

items.text:
Do kolejnych odcinków serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

1. Mężczyzna 1 (27) – kryminalista. Dobrze zbudowany. 
Data: 03. lipca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

2. Beniek (28) – Gangus poszukiwany listem gończym. Typ ryzykanta, który najpierw działa, potem myśli. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY !!!
Data: 02. lipca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

3. Dawid Górecki (35) – złodziej samochodów. W dobrej formie, opanowany, rozsądny.  KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY !!!
Data: 02. lipca
Stawka: 600 zł netto 

4. Dawid Kowara (37) – bandyta średniego szczebla, trochę mniej bystry. Silny, przypakowany. Lubi przestępcze życie, zawsze chętny do działania więc ma sporo za uszami, ale poza odsiedzianym wyrokiem 3 lata za wymuszenie nic mu nie udowodniono.  
Data: 29. i 30. czerwca
Stawka: 1400 zł za całość 

5. Albert Moński (39) – bandyta średniego szczebla, dość przenikliwy, zdecydowany w działaniu. Sprawny fizycznie ale nie kafar. W przeszłości dostał 5 lat za rozbój. W więzieniu bardzo się wycwanił, dlatego po wyjściu nic mu już nigdy nie udowodniono. Energiczny w zachowaniu (pada w tekście). KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY !!!
Data: 29. i 30. czerwca
Stawka: 1400 zł za całość 

6. Mężczyzna 2 (40) – sprawny fizycznie.
Data: 03. lipca
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.title: ❗️WARSZAWA, 20.06❗️

items.text:
hej, szukamy aktorów do nowego sezonu Trudnych Spraw:)
Urszula Jankowska (25-31 l.) - starsza siostra Agaty. 

Szczegóły: szefowa działu w firmie logistycznej, rzeczowa, poważna, surowa, po tragedii – wrażliwa, bezbronna.

DNI ZDJĘCIOWE: 28,29, 30 czerwiec

UWAGA! Od sceny 8 do końca Urszula nosi ciemne okulary. Ma scenę pocałunku.

BOHATEROWIE DRUGOPLANOWI:

Roman Kruk (41-47 l.) – lekarz okulista i specjalista rehabilitacji wzroku. 

Wygląd: Przystojny mężczyzna

Szczegóły: Poważny, szczery, inteligentny, specjalista w swojej dziedzinie. Zakochuje się w Agacie.

DNI ZDJĘCIOWE: 28, 29 czerwiec

scena pocałunku

Jacek (37-43 l.) – przyjaciel Romana. 

Wygląd: Ostre rysy, wyrazista twarz, nieco nieprzyjemna. Lekka nadwaga.

Szczegóły: Cyniczny, dwulicowy, wykorzystuje ludzi.

DNI ZDJĘCIOWE: 29 czerwiec

EPIZODYŚCI: TYLKO Z WROCŁAWIA

Dawid Lewicki (27-33 l.) – mąż Agaty. 

Wygląd: Ubiera się biznesowo, schludnie, ale bez charakteru. Nosi garnitury lub koszule z materiałowymi spodniami.

Szczegóły: Biznesmen, sprzedaje części samochodowe. Zmęczony wiecznymi kursami żony pragnie prostego rodzinnego szczęścia, gorących obiadów i kolacji, wygody i porządku w domu.

DNI ZDJĘCIOWE: 29 czerwiec

Statyści - pracownicy w firmie (25-55.)

DNI ZDJĘCIOWE: 27 czerwiec

 pieniążki płacone zaraz po planie w gotówce, stawka ustalana na priv

zgłoszenia również proszę wysyłać na priv:)

Wymagana dobra znajomość języka angielskiego – rola z kwestiami mówionymi.

 Stawka: 1000 zł brutto za dzień zdjęciowy 💗

Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać na adres e-mail - tatianamakhdi@gmail.com

 Numer telefonu do opiekuna

 Aktualne zdjęcia

Mam 14 lat i nigdy wcześniej nie grałam w żadnym filmie, ale to moje marzenie i bardzo chciałabym zdobyć pierwsze doświadczenie. Jeśli ktoś szuka kogoś początkującego, to chętnie podeślę więcej informacji 🙂

items.text:
FEATURE FILM – ASHES

Atlanta, GA | Non-Union | Paid
Rate: Starting at $300/day (negotiable for the right fit)
Shoot Window: Fall 2026

Casting Update:
Most principal and supporting roles have been cast. We are reopening submissions for the LEAD role of CAMILLE REYES.

LOGLINE

When a sharp Atlanta attorney is assigned to represent the estranged husband of her closest friend, buried history, desire, and betrayal force three people to choose what they’re willing to lose when loyalty turns to ash.

CAMILLE REYES (LEAD)

Woman, 30s
All ethnicities encouraged to submit.

A highly controlled Atlanta attorney whose carefully ordered life begins to unravel when unresolved feelings resurface during her best friend’s divorce case.

Camille carries the majority of the film and requires an actor capable of emotional restraint, intelligence, vulnerability, and strong screen presence. We’re looking for someone who can communicate internal conflict through behavior, silence, and subtle shifts rather than speeches.

Please submit:
• Headshot
• Resume (if available)
• Demo reel or self-tape
• Contact information

Subject Line:
ASHES – CAMILLE SUBMISSION

Send to:
S.johnsonstudiosatl@gmail.com

sharedPost.text:
Before the Pharaohs.
Before history had a name.

9186 BC.

A brutal prehistoric world awakens.

KEMET: YEAR ONE is a cinematic journey into the origins of civilization — filmed entirely on location in Egypt with massive practical environments, real fire lighting, and immersive world-building at an unprecedented scale.

Survival Sparks Civilization 

OFFICIAL GLOBAL THEATRICAL PREMIERE
26.6.26
—
‎٩١٨٦ قبل الميلاد.

‎قبل الفراعنة
قبل أن يحمل التاريخ اسماً.

‎عالم بدائي وحشي يستيقظ من جديد.

‎كيمت: السنة الأولى | رحلة سينمائية إلى بدايات الحضارة — صُورت بالكامل في مصر باستخدام مواقع حقيقية، وبيئات عملية ضخمة، وإضاءة نار حقيقية، وعالم سينمائي غير مسبوق في حجمه.

‎البقاء يشعل الحضارة

‏العرض العالمي الرسمي ٢٦.٦.٢٦

 Desert Eagle Films Empire Movies

#Kemet #KemetYearOne #KemetTheMovie #كيمت #كيمت_السنة_الأولى

items.text:
🌹✨ Meine neue Homepage ist online! ✨🌹

Mit großer Freude möchte ich euch meine neue Webseite vorstellen:

🌐 https://sabrina-kreativprojekte.beepworld.de/

Auf dieser Seite nehme ich euch mit auf meine kreative Reise als Autorin und Projektentwicklerin.

📖 Geschichten und Buchprojekte
🎭 Theater, Bühne und Kreativität
🎵 Musik- und Songprojekte
✨ IMPÉRIA – LUMIÈRE ÉTERNELLE
💡 Visionen und Herzensprojekte

🚧 Die Webseite befindet sich aktuell noch im Aufbau und wird von mir nahezu täglich erweitert und weiterentwickelt.

📝 Besonders würde ich mich freuen, wenn ihr mir einen Eintrag in meinem Gästebuch hinterlasst. Jeder Gruß, jedes Feedback und jeder Gedanke bedeuten mir sehr viel und helfen mir, meinen kreativen Weg weiterzugehen.

Vielen Dank für euren Besuch und eure Unterstützung. ❤️

🌹 Sabrina van der Felden
Autorin & Kreativprojekte

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎Sabrina van der ه Felden Autorin & Kreativprojekte Willkommen auf meiner kreativen Welt Welt Herzlich willkommen Mein Name ist Sabrina van der Felden.‎'‎

May be an image of text that says 'Herzlich willkommen Mein Name ist Sabrina van der Felden. Ich bin Autorin und entwickle kreative Projekte rund um Geschichten, Musik, Bühnenkunst und Storytelling. Diese Webseite gibt Einblicke in meine kreativen Arbeiten, meine Visionen und die Welt von IMPÉRIA- LUMIÈRE ÉTERNELLE. Kreativität bedeutet für mich, Ideen lebendig werden zu lassen, Menschen zu berühren und neue Welten zu erschaffen. Ich freue mich, Sie auf meiner kreativen Reise begrüßen zu dürfen. Herzlichst Sabrina van der Felden Autorin & Kreativprojekte'

May be an image of text that says 'Startseite Über mich Meine Vision IMPÉRIA LUMIÈRE ÉTERNELLE Musik & Kreativprojekte Gästebuch Kontakt Welt Herzlich willkommen Mein Name ist Sabrina van der Felden.'

items.text:
URGENT

SOUND RECORDIST NEEDED - LONDON - DUE TO DROP OUT.

We need a sound recordist with their own equipment, who is able to work on a fast paced film set.

DATES - 28/29/30 June and 8th and 11th July.

PROJECT - A beautiful, cinematic short film about loss, grief, alcoholism, recovery and love.

FEE - No fee collaboration, but all travel expenses within London will be reimbursed 2 weeks after the filming finishes.

There are other projects we are doing this year which you will be offered too!

Please only apply if you can fully commit to all dates.

We are a super fun, hard working team, who live for bringing original work to life.

We know that travel expenses only projects aren’t for everyone, so if this isn’t for you, please just scroll on instead of leaving hateful comments.

For more about us and reviews on what it’s like to work with us, please go to www.distortedrebels.com

To apply, please DM us or send us an email to info@distortedrebels.com

Thank you!
Phoenix 
Distorted Rebels Productions

items.text:
FEMALE RAPPER WANTED – MULTIPLE MUSIC PROJECTS
We are looking for a talented female rapper to collaborate on multiple upcoming music releases.

Requirements:

- Female, aged 18–40

- Able to record high-quality vocals from home and send stems/files remotely

- Available for music video shoots

- Strong rap delivery with confidence and personality

- Ideally based in or around Birmingham, although applications from other locations will be considered

Payment

Payment will be discussed with the successful applicant.

To Apply

Please send:

- An audio recording of your rap vocals and/or a music video

- A recent photo

- Any relevant social media or music links

Email: 

nadekmusic@gmail.com

If selected, there is potential for ongoing collaboration across multiple future projects.

items.text:
Actor needed for a SHORT THRILLER SERIES

Film title: " BLUNDER "

Production: Orbitec Studios
Director/Producer: Bedeyuri “Yuri” Fernandes
Location: London, UK
Format: Short Episodic Series (4–5 minutes per episode)
Genre: Psychological Thriller / Drama
Shoot Schedule: Weekends (1-day shoots per episode)

LOGLINE
A routine birthday gathering turns into a psychological trap when a mysterious package arrives at the wrong address—uncovering hidden identities, controlled manipulation, and a deadly sequence already set in motion.

SYNOPSIS
What begins as a simple night among friends quickly unravels into something far more dangerous.
When Fred receives an unexpected package, curiosity gets the better of him. But opening it triggers a chain reaction that none of them understand—and none of them can stop.
As tension rises inside the room, loyalties fracture and truths emerge. One of them is hiding something. Another is not who they seem. And the man who arrives to retrieve the package isn’t there to negotiate.
What feels like a mistake… begins to reveal itself as something designed. 

BLUNDER is a contained, high-tension psychological thriller exploring control, identity, and the consequences of a single decision.

FRED (Male, late 20s–mid 30s) — LEAD
Natural, grounded, relatable.
Must carry a strong emotional arc: relaxed - curious - unsettled - fearful -  

If you are interested, please reach me out. 

Shooting on August 8th and 9th - rehearsal on August 1st.

Many thanks 

Yuri

items.title: Actor needed for a SHORT THRILLER SERIES

items.text:
Proud to announce that Tammy Doyle and I have been working on a new short film titled 'Breaking the Cycle'. 

Based on true events, ‘Breaking the Cycle’ tells the story of Mia, a young mother trapped in a volatile relationship with her partner, Darren whiling caring for her newborn baby Conor. As his behaviour worsens, Mia endures physically and emotionally, taking it for the sake of their child. However, when the abuse intensifies and now threatens young Conor, Mia knows she must act. Taking a chance. Leaving the only life she has known and risking everything for the sake of herself and more importantly her child. Making those important steps towards breaking the generational cycle of abuse. 

After some time prepping, we are now ready to cast and seek crew for our short film.

We are looking for a small crew to help on shooting days in departments such as camera, lighting, sound, costume, make up and production assistants. 

Below features the list of characters we are looking to cast:

 

MIA (Early to Mid-20s) - Female

A young mother trying to survive an abusive relationship while caring for her newborn son. Physically and emotionally drained, she feels isolated and unsupported, yet possesses a quiet strength and resilience. Her love for her baby ultimately gives her the courage to escape and rebuild her life.

DARREN (Late 20s) - Male

A volatile, controlling, and increasingly dangerous man. Struggling with alcohol and drug abuse, his behaviour swings between intimidation and violence. He is deeply insecure and becomes jealous of the attention given to his own child, leading to escalating abuse.

DARREN’S FATHER RICHARD (50s–60s) – Male

Dismissive and self-interested, and an abuser himself, he downplays the seriousness of the situation. More concerned about maintaining access to his grandson than Mia’s safety, he represents a generation that avoids confronting abuse directly.

MIA’S SISTER DONNA (20s-30s) – Female (NON-SPEAKING)

Must be able to Drive

Practical and supportive, Mia’s sister helps her escape despite the risks involved. While not deeply involved emotionally, she steps up when it matters, providing a way out when Mia needs it most.

This is a micro-budget project currently, but we are in the process of seeking funding. However, until then, the project is UNPAID, however travel expenses and catering will be covered at the very least. 

If you are interested in the project, please send your applications to shaundaly2510@gmail.com with name, character you would like to audition for or crew role you are interested in, head shots and showreels, past work and other media would be greatly welcomed as well. Deadline for Applications for both Cast and Crew will be on Midnight of July 10th, 2026. With auditions to be held on 15th and 16th July with one day on the Wirral and the other in Liverpool City Centre. More details will be given closer to the time.

items.text:
CASTING CALL: Westhead

We are casting for THREE main roles for an upcoming short film to be filmed in Salford over 3-4 days in July 2026.

The film will be a part of the University of Salford MA Film Production: Major Project module. Written and directed by Hervey Bracken.

Please read the slides above for information on auditions via self-tape. Please share to actors who may be interested.

Email for more details.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting call Westhead Synopsis: Charlie. a teenage boy, is kicked out of school after a fight. He then must grapple with the repercussions and where he can go next. A film exploring neurodiversity in a UK school system. Filming in Salford/Manchester w/c 13th July-- or --W/c 20th July 2026 University of Salford MA Film Production short film Unpaid role as this is a student project but hoping to offer funds for travel and food. Contact: poemadjacentproductions@gmail.com for more information n auditions via self-tape. Please include character name in subject line. Deadline lune 29th.'

items.text:
The next installment in the My Horrible Roommate Winnie The Pooh series!
My Horrible Lover Winnie The Pooh is the next installment within the series. This will be a short film, rather then a full on feature length film like the last two. This is meant to be somewhat of a filler while also contributing to the ongoing story.

I am looking for a female to play the lover of Pooh. 

Character Description: a women who also has a thing for killing. She has a bad girl attitude, but also has a sweet spot for Pooh.

Age Range, 21 and up.

Location, Fort Collins 

Compensation: None

This will be premiering on YouTube along with the rest of the films. Please send me a message for more info!!

I am also looking for extras to be apart of the kill count as well!!

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL: MISS LONELYHEART'S MEMORY LIGHT - DENVER BASED FEATURE FILM!

Hello, my name is Rowan Harper and I am a recent graduate of CU Denver's Film and Television department. I am producing a feature film for a local filmmaker and we are looking for a wide variety of strong roles! All details below 👇

Longline: An 8-year-old girl with PTSD runs away from a foster home to confront her violent, deadbeat dad, and to piece together the fractured memory of her mother’s death.

Roles: 

Kid (A.K.A Grace) - Lead, Female, All Ethnicities, Age 6 - 12: A resilient and insightful child navigating the trauma of her mother’s death. She is described as being "wise beyond her years" with a premature sadness that defines her character. Kid suffers from undiagnosed PTSD, which manifests physically through stress-induced incontinence. Her primary companions are eight Tamagotchi virtual pets that she tends to as emotional lifelines.

Miss. Lonelyheart (Nonie Corazon) - Lead, Female, Hispanic/Latino, Age 60 - 90: An eccentric, unkempt recluse living in a decaying apartment building. She was displaced from Denver’s Auraria neighborhood during the 1970s Urban Renewal Program, a history that colors her reclusive nature. She is the owner of the "memory light," a magical analog device she uses to revisit her past.

Johnny Taylor - Supporting, Male, All Ethnicities, Age 40 - 60: Kid’s estranged father, recently out on parole and living in a dismal apartment. He is a Gulf War veteran (Operation Desert Storm) whose combat-induced PTSD contributes to a "vacant, mean meekness" and history of explosive violence. While he loves his daughter, he is "hollowed out" by instability and unable to provide the care she needs.

Wanda Howell - Supporting, Female, All Ethnicities, Age 20 - 50: Johnny’s girlfriend. She is a tough, chain-smoker with an "edgy energy" who wears cheap polyester clothing. Despite her flawed exterior, she is "unexpectedly kind" and serves as a vital anchor for Kid during moments of emotional free fall.

Samantha Dander - Supporting, Female, All Ethnicities, Age 20 - 35: A mousy and soft-spoken social worker who lives in the same building as Nonie. She is perennially dateless and lives in a dimly lit apartment filled with cats. She is an observant neighbor who becomes a hesitant witness to Kid's journey.

Otis - Supporting, Male, All Ethnicities, Age 60 - 80: A homeless blues guitarist who lives in a cardboard box outside Nonie’s building. Despite his living situation, he is remarkably clean and wears a white suit. He is observant and protective of his neighbors, often serving as a rhythmic "chorus" for the building’s activities - MUST BE PROFICIENT AT GUITAR 

Bruno - Supporting, Male, All Ethnicities, Age 40 - 60: The stubby superintendent and doorman of the apartment building. He is described as a "lazy, unpleasant package" who frequently clashes with Otis over property boundaries. Despite his aggressive demeanor, he is highly sensitive regarding his mother and struggles with his own feelings of isolation.

We are also looking for a smattering of bit parts, day players, ensemble and chorus roles. Please lease please consider those too. Email rowanharper386@gmail.com for any applications or questions. We are shooting July 13th - August 8th in Denver and Arvada Colorado. We will be flexible with your schedule. This project is non-union.

topComments.text: Kaity Gray tagging bc maybe Ruby could play an 8 year old!
I have a daughter who looks a bit older than 12, she is however 12 years old. Would that be ok or are u looking for more visibly younger looking kids?

items.text:
**BALTIMORE ACTORS WORKSHOP**

**Ongoing every Monday 7-10 pm** **$40 per mo. (4 classes)**

**Your First Class Free.** Bring a monologue, 2-3 min.

**Monologues, Scenes, Exercises, Work on your Craft.**

**All Levels Beg – Adv.**

**Michael McGee** (SAG-AFTRA/AEA) is an Award-winning actor, teacher and director. Michael’s approach is derived from teachers he trained with, from The Group Theatre and Actors Studio: Wendell Phillips, Jean Shelton, Stella Adler and Wendy Phillips. Michael trained in Sanford Meisner’s work and Michael Chekhov’s work as well.  McGee trained directly with George Shdanoff who helped Michael Chekhov develop the unique Chekhov exercises.

**Contact: ****[mjmc999@gmail.com](mailto:mjmc999@gmail.com)**** to get on the list and receive class location info.**

items.text:
CASTING CALL
For a SCAD senior thesis titled “SHOOTOUT”

It will be filming October 22nd-25th in Savannah, GA

It is paid (amount depends on character) 

Please read each character description as they do have requirements!

If interested please check out the sides at sophidarlingcasting.com or email sophiadarling.casting@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of hockey and text that says 'SHOOTOUT SHOOTING OCT 22ND-OCT 25TH SAVANNAH,GA WHEN THE THE CAPTAIN OF THE HOCKEY TEAM SUSTAINS A CAREER ENDING INJURY HOW FAR WILL SHE GO TO GET HER FINAL SHOT'

May be an image of text that says 'NICOLE BLACKWELL LEAD 28-36 YEARS OLD WOMAN $200/DAY NICOLE IS THE CAPTAIN OF THE ATLANTA ICE DRAGONS AND FIONA'S WIFE. SHE IS OVERCONFIDENT, SPORTED, AND BELIEVES SHE HAS TO BE THE BEST. SHE'S BEEN SECRETLY BATTLING A KNEE INJURY SHE HAS TOLD NOBODY ABOUT AND AS A RESULT, SHE BECAME OBSESSED WITH WINNING THE COYNE CUP. SHE UNDERSTANDS WITHOUT THE SURGERY HER CAREER WILL END PREMATURELY, BUT SHE PUSHES BACK BECAUSE SHE IS AFRAID THAT SHE'LL NEVER BE THE SAME PLAYER.'

May be an image of hockey and text that says 'FIONA SALO LEAD 28-36 YEARS OLD WOMAN $200/DAY SHE'S THE ASSIST CAPTAIN OF THE ATLANTA ICE DRAGONS AND NICOLE'S WIFE ANO TEAMMATE. SHE'S SOFT SPOKEN, BUT ON THE ICE, SHE IS DOMINANT AND LOUO. FIONA CARES DEEPLY FOR HER WIFE ANO TEAM ANO CAN BRING ANYONE DOWN FROM AN EMOTIONAL OUTBURST. SHE'S USUALLY PRETTY PERCEPTIVE AND NOTICES NICOLE CHANGES IN BEHAVIOR SHE GOES INTO PROTECTIVE MODE WANTING TO SAVE NICOLE FROM HER DESTRUCTIVE TENDENCIES.'

May be an image of basketball and text that says 'COACH BRUCE SUPPORTING 50 60 YEARS OLD WOMAN $150/DAY SHE IS A A FORMER STANDOUT PLAYER AND CURRENT HEAD COACH OF THE ATLANTA ICE DRAGONS. SHE WAS VERY SIMILAR TO NICOLE IN HER PLAYING DAYS, NEEDING TO BE THE BEST IN THE TEAM NO MATTER WHAT. AS THE HEAD COACH, SHE'S A NO NONSENSE WOMAN AND THRIVES FOR HER TEAM TO PLAY HARD AND SUPPORT ACH OTHER. SHE IS SECRETLY AWARE OF NICOLE'S INJURY.'

items.text:
Casting Call - NYC Short

ISO of 2 Black men (20s-early 30s) for a dialogue driven short set in a NYC deli, (Harlem, Washington heights or Brooklyn) 

📍NYC Area
🎥Non-Union *independent/solo*
1 Day shoot (approx- 3-5 hours)
🗓️ TBD *iso of delis that would give permission to shoot*
💰Compensation - $100 + meal/snacks, footage, & credit provided. 

Project-
Two stylish NYers debate the Knicks, Jay-Z, Drake, art, legacy and what makes a moment worth remembering while ordering sandwiches at a neighborhood deli before sitting at a bus stop. 

Think: 
Harlem meets Brooklyn 
Tyler, the Creator + A$ap Rocky
Intelligent, funny, conversational
Natural chemistry and improvisational energy encouraged.

Roles:
MALIK (Lead)
Black male, 20s-early 30s

Creative. Observant. Thoughtful. The kind of person who sees meaning in everything. Speaks with confidence and curiosity. Equal parts film student, poet, and neighborhood philosopher. 

ZION (Lead)
Black male, 20s-early 30s

Charismatic. Sharp. Competitive. Loves sports, music, and a good debate. Grounded, funny, and quick on his feet. The type to challenge every point just because he enjoys the conversation. 

Looking for actors who feel authentic to NYC culture and can move naturally between humor, intellect, and everyday conversations; distinctive fashion style aesthetics of Jordan Poole, Tyrese Haliburton, Devin Booker combined with the freeness/energy of Tyler the Creator.

Submissions: 
Headshot
Resume (if available)
Reel or self-tape 
Social handle (optional)

Can send it to Anaselenax@gmail.com!

sharedPost.text:
Hallo,meine Lieben
Ich möchte Euch mitteilen ,das jemand ohne meine Erlaubnis Fotos ,von mir postet und zwar bei Storyteller,die nicht dort hin gehören und zwar , Fotos wo ich zum Beispiel gerade  aufgestanden bin
So,etwas ist alles,andere als in Ordnung
Ich habe,über 12 Jahre lang Vollzeit  von 1998 bis 2011 als Tänzerin,für die  Bernd Walde Agentur gearbeitet Deutschlandweit ,auch in der Schweiz sowie ein wenig in Österreich
Auch habe,ich in ca 15 TV Rollen mitgewirkt für die Firma Filmpool 
Zum Beispiel : Familien im Brennpunkt,das Familiengericht,Niedrig und Kund,Kommissare ermiteln, der Blaulicht Report
Ich singe,seit vielen Jahren im Bereich Pop,Schlager,Christliche Songs
1996 Titel 3 Plazierte Miss Kassel,Aufträge im Modelbereich für verschiedene Fotografen
anita-kilian.de
Email chantalkdn@gmail.com
Ich bin,ein big Fan von Michael Jackson ,Tina Turner,Whitney Housten 
Seit 3 Jahren,habe ich einen Patensohn in Nigera
The name,from my lovely son is Larry Grace Godstime 

@

items.text:
**TV & FILM ACTING SUMMER SCHOOLS – NOW BOOKING! 🎭**

Looking for a Summer School that offers more than just a week of fun? At Meladrama Acting School & Chaos Actors Management, young performers will spend their summer developing performance skills and industry knowledge whilst working alongside professionals who actively work in television, film and theatre.

Whether your child already attends performing arts classes, is represented by an agent, is preparing for drama school auditions, or simply loves performing, our Summer Schools are designed to challenge, inspire and develop young talent.

🎥 PLUS the opportunity to film professionally shot, Spotlight-suitable footage for showreels and profiles (no extra charge!)

Many young actors struggle to find strong, age-appropriate footage for Spotlight and casting submissions. Throughout the week, students will have opportunities to work on camera and create material suitable for use in professional portfolios.

Led by professional actor Melanie Ash and supported by Leo Ashton (currently filming Waterloo Road and known for House of the Dragon, The Bay and Deep Water), students will benefit from genuine industry experience alongside a fun, supportive and inclusive environment.

📍 PRESTON & CHORLEY
3rd–7th August 2026
Lostock Hall Conservative Club, Preston

📍 WARRINGTON
10th–14th August 2026
St Wilfrid's Parish Hall, Church Lane, Grappenhall, Warrington WA4 3EP

📍 WIGAN
28th–31st July 2026
Worsley Hall, Bramble House, 8 Broom Road, Wigan WN5 9QE

Suitable for ages 5–17.

Whether your child wants to pursue acting professionally or simply develop confidence and creativity, we'd love to welcome them this summer.

🎟 Places are limited.

Book here:
[[https://meladrama.co.uk/summer-schools/](https://meladrama.co.uk/summer-schools/)](https://meladrama.co.uk/summer-schools/)

#ActingClasses #ChildActors #Spotlight #Showreel #ActingForTV #MusicalTheatre #DramaSchool #PerformingArts #YoungActors #TheatreKids #ChildActorLife #ActingCoach #TVActing #SummerSchool #LancashireFamilies #CheshireFamilies #WaterlooRoad #HouseOfTheDragon #Meladrama

items.text: Monday 29th - NEW ROUTINE! Great time to jump in…… just £3 for your first class!

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

items.text:
🎬 Huge congratulations to our talented adult actor Jonny on securing a role in an upcoming feature film through our talent agency. 

Many of you will also know Jonny as our very own Dewey Finn (Jack Black) in School of Rock. We are incredibly proud of his achievement and can’t wait to see him shine on the big screen and stage.

Why not come and see Jonny live in action at the Storyhouse Theatre, Chester from 13th-15th August as he leads our fantastic cast in School of Rock🎸🤘

Well done, Jonny - here’s to many more exciting opportunities ahead!

#FeatureFilm #SchoolOfRock #StoryhouseTheatre #Chester #MajesticAcademy

items.summary:
Æbletærte med vaniljebudding – klar på bare 10 minutter og himmelsk lækker 
Find opskriften i den første kommentar

items.text:
Jeg bagte disse to gange i denne uge, ricotta muffins på 5 minutter 
2 æg

🎬 MODELKA – WARSZAWA 🎬

Poszukujemy standinki/modelki do realizacji nowego filmu fabularnego.

📅 Termin: 13 czerwca 2026 r. (sobota)
📍 Lokalizacja: Warszawa
💰 Stawka: 140 zł
⏱ Czas pracy: do 7 godzin

🔎 Wymagania:
• wiek 16–18 lat
• uroda słowiańska
• blond włosy
• ciemna oprawa oczu

ℹ️ Informacje dodatkowe:
• wizerunek oraz głos nie będą wykorzystywane w filmie
• doświadczenie nie jest wymagane

📧 Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy mailowo: ludzie@unagimedia.pl 

W tytule wiadomości wpisz: **MODELKA**

W treści maila prosimy o podanie:
• imienia i nazwiska
• wieku
• wzrostu
• aktualnego zdjęcia portretowego
• aktualnego zdjęcia sylwetki

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami.

items.text: 🏆Fourth place tango professional stage

sharedPost.text:
Me siento inmensamente orgulloso de nuestro proceso. Bailar con el mejor compañero del mundo, a quien quiero un montón, ¡Gracias por tanto! Gracias a la vida y gracias al tango por hacernos vibrar asi.❤️gracias Alejandra Mantinan por siempre estar ahí por tus consejos y por esta experiencia vivida te quiero un montón ✨ 

🎬 bailarines: Andres Olaya & Yeferson Orrego 
📍 Lugar: Festival Internacional de Tango de Medellín
🎵 Música: Recuerdo - Quinteto Viceversa

#tangoargentino #tangoporyparavos #tango #colombia

items.text:
Documentary Casting:

Looking for some interviews for a documentary! Here's who I'm looking to talk to:

-anyone who had fake social media accounts using their photos
-AI-generated images or videos using their likeness
-Unauthorized use of headshots or promotional images
-Deepfake content
-Voice cloning
-Online impersonation
-Someone using their photos without permission
-Catfishing or identity theft
-Scam attempts involving fake voices or videos
-Harassment involving altered or manipulated images
-Concerns about how AI and digital technology may affect personal privacy
-Concerns about AI scanning, digital replicas, or ownership of their image and likeness

You don't need to have a dramatic story or be involved in a legal case. I'm simply interested in learning how these technologies are affecting people working in the entertainment industry and hearing about personal experiences.

If this sounds like something you've experienced, please send me an email with a little information about yourself and your experience. 

All interviews will take place July 22-24 in Los Angeles. They are one hour long, on camera, and paid. 

Please email me at stolenfacesdoc@gmail.com with a little about yourself and your story. Please no requests for crew or anything else. Thanks!

-Vanessa

items.text:
Providing an update for my film project "Call Center"

Title: Call Center

Genre: Comedy / Drama

Logline: Four friends — Kenneth, Nick, Tanisha, and Keisha — navigate the politics, chaos, and absurdity of working in a call center while questioning the rules of life to pass the time. Each member of the group is chasing personal goals while on the clock. Beneath the comedy, Kenneth privately battles personified versions of his Depression and Anxiety as they interact with him during difficult moments.

**CALL CENTER SUBMISSION - [ROLE NAME] - [YOUR NAME]**

Please include:
1. Headshot
2. Resume or acting experience
3. Reel, if available
4. Preferred role
5. Current city/location
6. Availability for the 2nd and 3rd weekends of July
7. Self-tape link or video attachment, if sides are provided

 

Roles:

1.      **Keisha: Female, 30-45. Black or Hispanic/Latina.**

Headstrong, sharp-tongued, stylish, and not afraid to curse someone out when necessary. She’s like a big sister to Kenneth as she understands he does have issues with his mental illnesses and tried to be his anchor to calm him down when needed. Keisha designs clothes, accessories, and trinkets that she sells to local mom-and-pop stores. Her long-term goal is to become a successful designer whose work is sold in major department store chains.

**Tone:** Bold, funny, confident, protective, blunt.

2.      **Tanisha**: **Female, 30-45. Hispanic, White, mixed race, or ethnically ambiguous. Bisexual.**The group’s marijuana connoisseur and experimental cannabis creative. Tanisha is passionate about growing her own strains, engineering unique blunts, and making gummies. When she talks about her machinations she tends to get tunnel vision as she treats her creations like her own children she is proud of. Her dream is to compete in and win local marijuana competitions. She is quirky, unpredictable, emotionally expressive, and deeply committed to her craft.

**Tone:** Chaotic, funny, expressive, strange in the best way, highly animated.

3.      **Derek**: **Male, 30-50. Any ethnicity.**

The department manager. Derek is positive, supportive, and genuinely wants his team to succeed. He tries to keep the department moving forward while managing strong personalities, office politics, and workplace chaos.

**Tone:** Supportive manager, patient, professional, quietly funny.

**4.      Customer (Voice role): Male, 30-50. Any ethnicity.**

Calling into customer support and speaks with Kenneth. Is angry and hostile as he has a technical support problem that he wants fixed not now, but “Right Now”. Has a verbal back and forth with the lead character Kenneth as he tries to resolve the issue.

Production Company: Ch1-R0n1n productions

Production Type: Indie Web Series

Contact Information: mcgeebrian8@gmail.com

Run Time: Short (23 minutes)

Compensation: Paid. $100 flat rate per role for two shooting days.

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Callback(s) within three weeks. 

Shooting Schedule: Planning for the 2nd-3rd weekend of July. 2 day 10 hour shoot.

Filming Location: Greenwood Village, Co

Project Description: *Call Center* is an adult workplace comedy-drama about four friends surviving the politics, gossip, frustrations, and absurd conversations of life inside a corporate call center. While taking calls and navigating management drama, the group works on their personal goals, side hustles, relationships, and dreams while questioning the strange rules of adulthood. Beneath the comedy, the story follows Kenneth as he privately battles personified versions of Depression and Anxiety, giving the series an emotional inner-world contrast to the chaos of the office.

**Content Notes:** Adult language, sexual humor, cannabis references, workplace conflict, and mental health themes including depression, anxiety, and suicidal ideation.

topComments.text: Has anxiety and depression been  filled?  ￼

*****Extended Deadline + Adjusted Stipend*****

# Stagebugz Theatre is still seeking actors for "Cryptophasia"!

The deadline to submit a video audition for this world premiere production has been extended through 12 PM (noon) on Sunday, June 14th.

## **Dates:**

**Rehearsals- **June 25th through July 18th, scheduled around actor availability (A tentative rehearsal schedule can be viewed *HERE***)** 

**Tech rehearsals- **July 20th-22nd 

**Performances-** July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM

## **Compensation:** 

Actors will be paid a guaranteed $100 stipend, plus portion of net profits

***For More Information and to Submit An Audition, Visit: ****https://www.stagebugztheatre.com/auditions*

sharedPost.text:
Asim.
The guardian.
Disciplined. Loyal. Unshaken.

A protector shaped by the unforgiving lands of prehistoric Kemet — standing watch as survival begins to shape the future of civilization.

26.6.26 — Survival Sparks Civilization

‎عاصم.
‎الحارس.
‎منضبط. وفيّ. لا يهتز.

‎حامٍ صاغته قسوة كيميت ما قبل التاريخ… يقف حارسًا بينما يبدأ البقاء في تشكيل مستقبل الحضارة.

‎٢٦.٦.٢٦ — البقاء يشعل الحضارة

#KemetYearOne #Kemet #DesertEagleFilms #BUCStudios #كيمت_السنة_الأولى

✨ WE’RE HIRING ✨
Happily Ever After Princesses is looking for magical new performers to join our royal team! 👑

Do you love bringing fairytales to life? We’re on the lookout for talented, reliable, and passionate performers who can sing, sparkle, and make dreams come true.

📩 To apply, please send the following to happilyeverafterprincesses1@gmail.com:
💫 Your CV
🎤 A singing reel
📸 A recent headshot

Applications are now open — we can’t wait to meet our next princess! 💕

#PrincessPerformer #CastingCall #NowHiring #PrincessJobs #happilyeverafterprincesses

items.text:
🎭 AUDITIONS – JACK ABSOLUTE FLIES AGAIN 🎭

Join us on Wednesday 18 June at 7:00pm at the Harlequin Theatre for auditions for Jack Absolute Flies Again.

Set during the Battle of Britain in 1940, this fast-paced comedy follows RAF pilot Jack Absolute as he returns home determined to win back the heart of his former love, Lydia Languish. Inspired by Sheridan's classic comedy The Rivals, the play is packed with mistaken identities, romantic misunderstandings, larger-than-life characters and plenty of laugh-out-loud moments.

With its blend of wartime spirit, romance and farce, Jack Absolute Flies Again offers a wide range of exciting roles and a fantastic opportunity for performers of all experience levels.

Check out our audition's page on our website: www.harlequinplayers.com/auditions

📅 Auditions: Wednesday 18 June

🕖 Time: 7:00pm

📍 Venue: Harlequin Theatre

We look forward to seeing you there!

items.text:
Casting for female late teens / early 20s - London 

Casting for the role of Bri in Pass To Gain! a 15 min play to be performed at Riverside Studio this weekend following a last minute drop out.

Bri is a student vet that unwittingly finds herself competing in a deathly game show .

We had an actress drop out last minute. Opportunity is unpaid but is part of Burnt Orange Ripe festival and should be a good opportunity to meet lots of people + happy to buy you a pint and cover tube fair.

DM if interested!

items.text:
‘Daisies’ Short Film Casting Call
Hi everyone,

I’m currently producing a short film titled ‘Daisies’, and we’re now casting.

Logline: When their affair is discovered by her violent boyfriend, a man goes on the run with his best friend while the woman he loves faces the consequences of their secret.

More information (full plot, writer’s notes, mood board):

www.writenbystokes.com 

We are casting:

* 2 Female actors (playing age 18–30)

* 2 Male actors (playing age 18–30)

(Midlands-based actors

Food and travel expenses will be provided 

First Shoot

* Date: 25th May 2026

* Location: Birmingham

* Actors: 2 Female

* Time: From 12pm onwards

Second Shoot

* Date: TBC

* Location: Peak District

* Actors: 2 Male

* Time: Full day

A possible third shoot, depending on the other two. 

If interested, please send: 

* Headshot

* Showreel (if available)

* Your location

Email: cjamesstokes19@gmail.com

items.text:
Hello all. I’m looking for an East Asian woman 50+ to play a grandmother in a short student film in London. The film is about greif and love.

It’s a one-day shoot on the 15th of May in East 15 Acting School. This is a low-budget student project, travel covered.

If you’re open to it, I can send details and you can decide if it’s for you.

Thank you!

items.text:
**Gesucht: Männer & Frauen aus Deutschland ab 30 für kurze Handy-Videos – 100 €**

Für ein Werbe-/Contentprojekt im Bereich digitales

Gesundheitsangebot & ärztlich begleitetes Gewichtsmanagement suchen wir authentische Privatpersonen aus Deutschland ab 30 Jahren für kurze Videos im Selfie-Stil.

Wir suchen bewusst keine Fitness-Influencer, Models oder perfekt inszenierten Werbegesichter, sondern normale Menschen mit natürlicher, glaubwürdiger Ausstrahlung.

Worum geht es?
* 1 kurzes Smartphone-Video
* Länge: ca. 15–30 Sekunden
* natürlicher Selfie-Stil
* Text/Briefing wird von uns gestellt
* Aufwand gering
* Vergütung: 100 €

Wichtig:
* Deutschsprachig
* natürliche Ausstrahlung
* keine Schauspielerfahrung nötig
* kein professionelles Setup nötig
* aktuelle Fotos oder kurzes Beispielvideo zur Einschätzung 

Besonders passend sind Menschen, die sich glaubwürdig in Themen wie Alltag, Gesundheit, Gewichtsmanagement oder Abnehmen wiederfinden.

Zur Einordnung: Es geht um ein digitales Gesundheitsangebot rund um medizinisch begleitetes Abnehmen. Persönliche Behandlungserfahrungen sollen nur genannt werden, wenn sie wirklich vorhanden sind. Alternativ sind auch gescriptete Info-/Werbevideos möglich, ohne dass eine eigene Behandlungserfahrung behauptet wird.

Bei Interesse bitte melden mit:
* Vorname
* Alter
* Wohnort
* aktuellem Foto
* optional kurzem Beispielvideo / Sprachaufnahme
* kurzer Info, ob eigene Erfahrung mit Gewichtsmanagement / Abnehm-Themen vorhanden ist

topComments.text: Hallo. Ich habe großes Interesse und würde gerne teilnehmen. Wohin darf ich meine Angaben bzw. Fotos usw. hinschicken? Liebe Grüße Daniel

CASTING CALL: Westhead

We are casting for THREE main roles for an upcoming short film to be filmed in Salford over 3-4 days in July 2026.

The film will be a part of the University of Salford MA Film Production: Major Project module. Written and directed by Hervey Bracken.

Please read the slides above for information on auditions via self-tape. Please share to actors who may be interested.

Email for more details.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting ćalli Westhead Synopsis: Charlie. a teenage boy, is kicked out of school after a fight. He then must grapple with the repercussions and where he can next. A film exploring neurodiversity in a UK school system. Filming in Salford/Manchester w/c 13th July-- or --W/c 20th July 2026 Universitv of Salford MA Film Production short film Unpaid role as this is a student project but hoping to offer funds for travel and food. Contact: poemadjacentproduacins@gmail.com for more information on auditions via self-tape. Please include character name in subject line. Deadline lune 29th.'

items.text:
CASTING CALL – EXTRAS & SUPPORTING ARTISTS
PROJECT TITLE: MA Film Student Short Film (Title TBC)

PROJECT DESCRIPTION: An upcoming short film produced by an MA Film student, set to be filmed in Cardiff. The production is currently seeking enthusiastic Extras and Supporting Artists to help bring multiple scenes to life. This is a great opportunity to gain on-set experience, network with fellow creatives, and be part of an exciting independent film project.

LOCATION: 📍 Cardiff, Wales, UK

CASTING REQUIREMENTS: 🎭 Extras & Supporting Artists

- Open to all genders, ethnicities, and backgrounds

- Ages 18+

- No previous acting experience required

- Must be available to appear in multiple scenes during the production period

- Reliable, enthusiastic, and comfortable working on a film set

FILMING DATES: 📅 

From 13th July onwards (Exact filming schedules will be provided to selected participants.)

PAYMENT & EXPENSES: 💷 Unpaid Opportunity

This is a student film production. Please enquire directly regarding any travel or other expense coverage.

CONTACT DETAILS:

Yasaman 📞 +44 7760 989247

Maria 📞 +44 7549 870273

TO APPLY: Please comment below or contact Yasaman or Maria directly for further information and availability details.

Feel free to share this opportunity with anyone who may be interested in gaining experience in film production and acting.

#CastingCallUK #CardiffFilmNetwork #StudentFilm #ExtrasNeeded #SupportingArtists #CardiffActors #FilmProduction #IndependentFilm #CardiffCasting

items.text:
Gunsmoke Productions LLC now casting for the new psycho thriller film

NEEDED IMMEDIATELY:

1 Handsome and fit Caucasian Male 50s for cooperate type father with darkside (secretly sleezy) type.

1 Caucasian male 30-40 but could pass for younger in flash back scenes. Basketball player height/ athlete type.  Role of the unsuspecting killer.

EXTRAS/BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED AS WELL

African American female early 20s to pass for hs girls basketball player needed. 

Office scene background actors needed any race. 

Background of all races needed in early 20 and early 30s for senior prom scene and college party and  reunion party scenes

Caucasian Male needed for small town deputy sheriff type needed.

NON-UNION

Compensation: Residuals/royalties/profitsharing

The series will be filmed in the Upstate S.C. area.

Auditions will be held via Google Meet conference call. If you know you can not attend virtual table reads,  are not consistently available please do not reply. For more information and consideration email us at gunsmokeproductionsllc@gmail.com 

Please include 2 unfiltered face pic and 2 full body shot along with your age, contact number and current city. ABOLUTELY NO AI PICS 

SUBMISSIONS WITHOUT REQUIRED INFO AND PICS WILL NOT GET A RESPONSE

Serious inquires only. SERIOUS MEANS SERIOUS!!!

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"
Wanted !!!!!
I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet. But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men 25 to 36 years old, good looking who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

items.text:
Now casting
Casting a 3-4 year old girl actress for one short scene no dialogue walking in a park. This is a student / indie film- NO PAY but actors will receive IMDb and screen credits. Looking for preferably blonde or lighter tone hair and either hazel or green eyes if possible. Mainly looking for a sweet face with big eyes and cute personality.

WHERE: FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES / SAN FERNANDO VALLEY AREA.

WHAT: One short scene (the ending of the movie) a little girl and a grandpa in a grass field holding hands walking in the sunset.

SYNOPSIS:

“Unforgettable” is a story about hope, courage and the determination of one woman’s journey of the impossible. Through this true story, we learn how one-woman refusal to give up a dream would allow her to receive unusual confirmations from beyond and how a loving song showed her signs of hope along the way. A true story of synchronicity and love between a grandfather and a very special song.

If you know someone who would fit this role please DM me! Looking to film sometime between now and August.

💎Dance Diamonds Kids💎 December 19–20, 2026, at Stadthalle Hückelhoven. Registration is open from October 1, 2026, to December 6, 2026.
www.art-element.de/dance-diamonds
🌟This competition is organized specifically for young performers aged 3 to 12. 🌟Participation takes place in the categories of Solo, Duo/Trio, Small Group, and Group.
🌟Additionally, participants are divided into different categories based on their level of preparation, whether they are individual performers or dance groups. 💥"Dance Prodigy"💥 March 6–7, 2027, at Stadthalle Hückelhoven. Registration is open from November 1, 2026, to February 10, 2027.
www.art-element.de/danceprodigy
🔥The competition features a unique format, incorporating audiovisual multimedia stage design.
⚡️The project places great emphasis on dance as a performing art; the media-art stage design enhances the dramatic impact of each choreography, presenting the performance through a contemporary aesthetic.
🌟The competition is open to participants of all ages—specifically groups of three or more performers—and showcases a variety of dance styles.
⚡️Participants and dance groups are categorized according to their respective levels of experience and preparation.

🛎Visit www.art-element.de for detailed information about our team, our projects and event programs, and our archives.

✨️If you have any further questions, please feel free to contact us by phone or WhatsApp at 0049-15773131438.
♥️Our team looks forward to your participation in our dance competitions!🏆

sharedPost.text:
Judith Uchechukwu Moghalu is her real name before she adopted the stage name
Judy Austin.
She is from Umuoji in Anambra State. We have two children together. Sometimes I ask myself, ‘Wetin man do man?’
Anytime we were watching Nollywood movies and Yul Edochie appeared on screen, Judy would lose concentration.
She would openly tell me she loved Yul and praise him.
She also used to say that Yul Edochie’s voice reminded her of her uncle, Chinedu.
I have four pieces of evidence that they were dating under my roof.”
- Mr. Obasi, Judy Austin’s former husband, became emotional during an interview as he presented photos and other materials which he says are evidence of their marriage. #trendy #nigeria

items.text:
Now casting
Casting a 3-4 year old girl actress for one short scene no dialogue walking in a park. This is a student / indie film- NO PAY but actors will receive IMDb and screen credits. Looking for preferably blonde or lighter tone hair and either hazel or green eyes if possible. Mainly looking for a sweet face with big eyes and cute personality.

WHERE: FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES / SAN FERNANDO VALLEY AREA.

WHAT: One short scene (the ending of the movie) a little girl and a grandpa in a grass field holding hands walking in the sunset.

SYNOPSIS:

“Unforgettable” is a story about hope, courage and the determination of one woman’s journey of the impossible. Through this true story, we learn how one-woman refusal to give up a dream would allow her to receive unusual confirmations from beyond and how a loving song showed her signs of hope along the way. A true story of synchronicity and love between a grandfather and a very special song.

If you know someone who would fit this role please DM me! Looking to film sometime between now and August.

items.text:
Love queer cabaret? Join us tomorrow, Friday 19 June, as Queer Theatre brings 12 brilliant queer cabaret artists to the Two Brewers in Clapham for a big, sexy night of music, comedy, drag, spoken word, theatre and beautiful queer chaos.

Hosted by our very own Josh Sanchez, with Bran Isabella, Crispin Dipp, Gareth Williams, Grace Lightning, The W*nkers, Lady Harmony Heaven, Lee Campbell, Ryan Graham Hinds, Sir Lady Afrique, Sophia Kleanthous and Victor Von Plume.

Social by design. Hop on different tables to meet other queer creative people, plus special guests, main-stage cabaret afterwards and a DJ until 4am.

🎟️ Tickets are only £20 and now limited. Book via the Queer Theatre website. All profits supporting LGBTQIA+ theatre-projects.

THIS COULD BE THE OPPORTUNITY OF A LIFETIME 

Have you ever dreamed of traveling the world, changing lives, and getting paid to tell incredible human stories?

We’re casting charismatic duos to become the faces of a major philanthropy YouTube channel, traveling across the globe and meeting people whose stories deserve to be seen and heard.

We’re looking for:

 Couples

 Best Friends

 Siblings

 Dynamic Duos

If you have amazing chemistry, a magnetic personality, a sense of adventure, and a genuine passion for helping others, we want to hear from you.

Apply at: MysticArt Pictures

#philanthropy #payitforward #TeamMystic #casting

items.text:
**LAPLANDUK CASTING CALL - FATHER CHRISTMAS**  

LaplandUK are seeking performers to bring to life the pivotal role of Father Christmas.  

A warm, charismatic, and deeply believable embodiment of the beloved festive figure at the heart of the LaplandUK experience. 

LaplandUK is an immersive theatrical experience, mixing scripted shows and improvised interactions, inspired by the original stories written by Alison Battle and Mike Battle. At its heart lies a child’s fleeting belief in Father Christmas, Mother Christmas, and the magical Elven world they call home, a world brought vividly to life through richly woven storytelling and theatrical spectacle.   

**ROLE DETAILS ** 
Father Christmas Pay: £20.50 per hour (training & live show)  
£50 daily subsidy per working day  
Rehearsal days approx. 8 hours 

**AUDITION DATES ** 
London (Camberley Theatre) 
Monday 8th – Friday 12th June  

Manchester (Capesthorne Hall) 
Monday 15th – Friday 19th June 

Audition slots are limited and filling quickly, therefore, to be considered, please complete either the London or Manchester application form below and we’ll send full audition details and next steps. 

**LONDON** 
[https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Ascot-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-an…](https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Ascot-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Ascot-2026/125) 

**MANCHESTER** 
[https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Manchester-Cheshire-United-Kingdom-of-Gr…](https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Manchester-Cheshire-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Manchester-2026/126) 

If you have any questions, please contact [eventhr@lapland.group](mailto:eventhr@lapland.group)

items.summary:
**LAPLANDUK CASTING CALL - FATHER CHRISTMAS**  

LaplandUK are seeking performers to bring to life the pivotal role of Father Christmas.  

A warm, charismatic, and deeply believable embodiment of the beloved festive figure at the heart of the LaplandUK experience. 

LaplandUK is an immersive theatrical experience, mixing scripted shows and improvised interactions, inspired by the original stories written by Alison Battle and Mike Battle. At its heart lies a child’s fleeting belief in Father Christmas, Mother Christmas, and the magical Elven world they call home, a world brought vividly to life through richly woven storytelling and theatrical spectacle.   

**ROLE DETAILS ** 
Father Christmas Pay: £20.50 per hour (training & live show)  
£50 daily subsidy per working day  
Rehearsal days approx. 8 hours 

**AUDITION DATES ** 
London (Camberley Theatre) 
Monday 8th – Friday 12th June  

Manchester (Capesthorne Hall) 
Monday 15th – Friday 19th June 

Audition slots are limited and filling quickly, therefore, to be considered, please complete either the London or Manchester application form below and we’ll send full audition details and next steps. 

**LONDON** 
[https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Ascot-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-an…](https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Ascot-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Ascot-2026/125) 

**MANCHESTER** 
[https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Manchester-Cheshire-United-Kingdom-of-Gr…](https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Manchester-Cheshire-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Manchester-2026/126) 

If you have any questions, please contact [eventhr@lapland.group](mailto:eventhr@lapland.group)

sharedPost.text:
Basta de abusos contra el circo tradicional peruano 
Está desesperación por captar público desde antes de debutar les hace publicar ofertas que desnaturalizan los costos de las entradas para los circos,  ¿Para eso ingresan a presentar circos en temporada de fiestas patrias para después tirarse al suelo? ¿Les importará algo que esto afecte bastante al circo tradicional que espera la temporada de fiestas patrias para poder hacer algo de caja para el resto del año? 
Vamos a seguir denunciando con pruebas de las publicidades que consigamos.

items.text: Bogstaveligt talt ALLE kender dette simple trick til perfekt pillede hårdkogte æg. Hvordan kan det være, at du ikke ved det?? Det var min vens reaktion, da jeg viste ham mine ikke-så-perfekt pillede æg. Han er trods alt kok. Han viste mig det nemmeste hack, og nu griner jeg af mig selv, fordi jeg ikke vidste det, før jeg delte det i den første kommentar.

🎬 CASTING CALL – SCOTLAND

We are looking for a baby girl or boy aged 3-10 months with brown to dark hair for an upcoming period drama filming in Scotland.

Requirements:
• Must be based in Scotland
• Must be available on 15th and 17th July 2026

If this sounds like your little one, please email info@cameronkidsassociates.com.

Please do not send photos with your initial email, as any emails containing photos will not be considered. We provide secure upload links for photographs once contact has been made.

We look forward to hearing from you! #baby #littleone #casting #agency #cameronkidsassociates

sharedPost.text:
Ready to go deeper?

The Actors Gym: Emotion & Script — this one will change how you work.

Three intensive sessions. Real technique. Truthful acting.

📅 Tuesdays 7, 14 & 21 July
⏰ 11am – 2pm
📍 Audition House
Led by The Official Meisner School in London, this workshop will help you stop performing and start living truthfully in your scenes.

Limited spaces. Don’t sleep on it.

👉 Book via email hello@meisnerlondon.com

#ActorsGym #MeisnerLondon #ActingWorkshop #MeisnerTechnique #LondonActors EmotionAndScript ActingClass AuditionHouse BehaveTruthfully

Actor with stage combat experience available for work.

I am a trained actor with stage combat experience, currently seeking opportunities in film, TV,, and independent productions.

IMDb, Spotlight and instagram profiles available, Equity member.

Open to theatre and student/independent projects.

items.text:
Æblekage smelter i munden på 10 minutter! En forsmag på barndommen!

Ingredienser:
4 æg.
En knivspids salt.
Sukker 225 g. Planteolie 180 ml. Mælk 225 ml. Mel 375 g. Bagepulver 24 g. 1-2 æbler.

Jeg skal udtrykke noget for at blive ved med at få mine opskrifter... Tak.

sharedPost.text:
✨ Wo Kunst auf Leben trifft. ✨

Große Geschichten leben von großen Persönlichkeiten. Mit Markus Majowski als Vetter bereichert einer der bekanntesten deutschen Schauspieler und Entertainer unser Ensemble von JEDERMANN – Das Spiel vom Sterben des reichen Mannes.

Erlebt ein bewegendes Theaterereignis voller Leidenschaft, Humor, Emotion und zeitloser Fragen über das Leben selbst.

🎭 Bremen • Coburg • Weimar • Graz • Dresden • Bayreuth

🌐  www.jedermann-theater.de⁠￼

#Jedermann #MarkusMajowski #Theater #OpenAirTheater #WoKunstAufLebenTrifft #NicolaiTegeler #TheaterErlebnis #Kultur #Schauspiel #LiveErleben

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 25/2026

EIN KULTKLASSIKER WIRD 25, THEATERHIGHLIGHT IN RADLBRUNN UND DER ÜBERRASCHUNGSHIT AUS DEN USA

Der mit Spannung erwartete Horrorfilm „Backrooms“ feiert Kinopremiere. Der Film basiert auf der bekannten Creepypasta- und YouTube-Webserie.

Die Bühne Weinviertel bringt das bekannte Theaterstück „Der Bockerer“  im Sommer 2026 als Wiederaufnahme auf die Freiluftbühne im historischen Brandlhof in Radlbrunn. Die Hauptrolle des Wiener Fleischhauers Karl Bockerer übernimmt Intendant Christoph Stich, den unsere Moderatorin Sarah Fuchs dazu ausführlich befragte.

Was 2001 als packender Undercover-Krimi in der Tuning-Szene von Los Angeles begann, ist heute mit zehn Hauptfilmen und über sieben Milliarden US-Dollar Einspielergebnis eines der erfolgreichsten Kino-Universen der Welt. Die Reihe hat die globale Autokultur, Musik und das Popkultur-Verständnis von „Family“ nachhaltig geprägt. Anlässlich dieses Anniversary gibts den Soundtrack zu THE FAST AND FURIOUS in der Sendung zu hören.

Mittwoch 17.6.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.text:
Poszukuje Mamy z synkiem w wieku od około 3 do 4 lat do sesji video produktu dla dzieci, dla polskiej marki Rabbit & Friends

Sesja (krótkie video -do online- promujące nowy produkt) w dniu 26 czerwca (piątek) lub 27 czerwca (sobota) - dzień do ustalenia, w Warszawie - Targówek. Umowa na wizerunek zarówno dziecka jak i Mamy bezterminowo i bez ograniczeń terytorialnych. 
Płatność 500zł
Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na sylwia@rabbitandfriends.eu do 21czerwca. 
Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać numer telefonu, Twoje imię i nazwisko, imię, wiek i rozmiar ubranka dziecka oraz aktualne zdjęcia buzi i sylwetek.
Na sesje trzeba przeznaczyć ok 3-4godz, w zależności jak sprawnie pójdzie współpraca z kamerzystą 🙂 Jeśli dziecko będzie potrzebować czasu, czy przerwy jesteśmy elastyczne. Byłoby lepiej, gdyby dziecko czuło się swobodnie przed kamerą i było uśmiechnięte, nie wystraszone kamery.

Szukam też dzieci w wieku 3-5, zarówno chłopiec jak i dziewczynka, do drugiej sesji: foto, do tego samego produktu. Już bez Mamy 🙂

Na zdjęciu super Lampka silikonowa Miś Duży z Głośnikiem i Pilotem 🙂 

W razie pytań, proszę pisać na maila.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM (CINEMA) 

URGENT: More submissions needed for LIZ & Andre

Shoot begins August (exact dates TBC). 
Day rate £300 + expenses. Locations: Birmingham + other UK areas. 

Please email Farhan Baqi at farhan.baqi@mcccuk.co.uk with 2 photos or a Spotlight link, and make sure to put the character name in the subject line (saves me hours 😛). 

These roles have multiple shoot dates and are not one‑liners, so we are looking for experienced or trained actors. 

LIZ (18–24): Ginger‑haired British Caucasian girl, fun, confident, outgoing, loyal, courageous, protective of friends; must have or convincingly perform a Birmingham/West Midlands accent; musical background a bonus. (If you are happy to dye the hair then please do apply)

ANDRE (18–24): Black/African‑British, Male. third‑generation Caribbean heritage, charismatic with strong rhythm and natural performance energy; musical background preferred
But not essential 

Thank you.
FB
MCCC

LIZ (18–24): Ginger‑haired British Caucasian girl, fun, confident, outgoing, loyal, courageous, protective of friends; must have or convincingly perform a Birmingham/West Midlands accent; musical background a bonus. (If you are happy to dye the hair then please do apply)

ANDRE (18–24): Black/African‑British, Male. third‑generation Caribbean heritage, charismatic with strong rhythm and natural performance energy; musical background preferred
But not essential 

Thank you.
FB
MCCC

items.text:
# **[KRAKÓW] CASTING NA PROWADZĄCEGO / WSPÓŁTWÓRCĘ PODCASTU WIDEO**

Szukam charyzmatycznego prowadzącego do autorskiego podcastu w Krakowie. Ty dostarczasz wizerunek, wiedzę i pomysł, ja zapewniam pełne zaplecze produkcyjne. Szukam partnera, a nie klienta do wynajęcia studia.

Jesteś aktorem/aktorką, świetnie czujesz się przed kamerą i masz nienaganną dykcję, ale oprócz tego masz unikalną wiedzę, pasję (niekoniecznie związaną z aktorstwem!) i znasz swoją niszę od podszewki? Świetnie. Ja dysponuję w Krakowie w pełni wyposażonym, profesjonalnym studiem wideo (wielokamerowy system na pełnoklatkowych aparatach Lumix, miksery ATEM, profesjonalne oświetlenie) oraz twardym technicznym know-how.

Połączmy te dwa kapitały. Stwórzmy format oparty na idealnej synergii i bezkompromisowej jakości.

**Jak wygląda nasz podział ról?**
* **Twoja działka (Wizerunek, Charyzma i Merytoryka):** Jesteś twarzą, głosem i mózgiem operacyjnym w kwestii treści. Wykorzystujesz swój warsztat przed kamerą, ale wchodzisz do studia i skupiasz się wyłącznie na tym, w czym jesteś absolutnym ekspertem. Zapraszasz wartościowych gości, prowadzisz rozmowy, dzielisz się wiedzą i budujesz społeczność wokół formatu.
* **Moja działka (Technologia i Zaplecze):** Pełnię rolę Twojego technicznego wspólnika i producenta. Biorę na siebie 100% procesów realizacyjnych. Odpowiadam za wielokamerową realizację obrazu, zaawansowany montaż i profesjonalną obróbkę dźwięku (DaVinci Resolve). Wycinam z naszych nagrań dynamiczne formaty pionowe (TikTok, Reels, Shorts), optymalizuję je i ogarniam techniczną stronę dystrybucji.

**Model biznesowy (Zasady 50/50):** Gramy do jednej bramki. Nie płacisz mi z góry za wynajem studia ani za montaż. Budujemy wspólne przedsięwzięcie i dzielimy się zyskami z monetyzacji (przychody z YouTube, wsparcie od widzów przez Patronite, kontrakty sponsorskie, lokowania, a w przyszłości własne produkty) dokładnie po połowie. Dzielimy ryzyko i dzielimy sukces.

Zależy mi na osobie, która podchodzi do biznesu z pełnym profesjonalizmem, ma na siebie konkretny pomysł i potrafi konsekwentnie działać. Żeby sprawdzić nasze biznesowe dopasowanie i chemię przed kamerą, zrobimy na start 4-odcinkowy sezon pilotażowy (Proof of Concept). Zobaczymy, jak współpracuje nam się w praktyce.

**CZEGO WYMAGAM NA START (Przeczytaj uważnie):**

Jeśli widzisz w tym potencjał, wyślij mi wiadomość prywatną. Oczekuję jednak maksymalnego konkretu. Twoja aplikacja musi precyzyjnie i w szczegółach opisywać:
1. **Format i tematykę:** Jaki dokładnie podcast chcesz prowadzić i do kogo docelowo ma trafiać?
2. **Twarde kompetencje:** Dlaczego to właśnie Ty masz o tym mówić? Samo wykształcenie aktorskie to za mało – wymagam jasnego potwierdzenia ekspertyzy w wybranym temacie (poparte dowodami: doświadczenie zawodowe, zrealizowane projekty, konkretne zainteresowania).
3. **Bazę gości:** Czy masz własną sieć kontaktów, znajomych lub współpracowników z danej branży, których od razu będziesz w stanie zaprosić do udziału w projekcie w charakterze gości?

**Ważna uwaga na koniec:** Szanujmy swój czas. Jeśli Twoja wiadomość nie będzie precyzyjna i zabraknie w niej szczegółów dotyczących Twojego pomysłu, kompetencji oraz konkretnego zakresu działania – nie odpiszę.

Czekam na profesjonalne propozycje na priv.

NOWY PROGRAM KULINARNY ZGŁOŚ SIĘ JUŻ DZIŚ!
Lubisz gotować? Gotowanie to Twoja pasja?

Szukamy uczestników do nowego programu kulinarnego. Mile widziane są osoby, które po raz pierwszy chcą spróbować swoich sił przed kamerami.

Jeśli gotowanie sprawia Ci przyjemność, czekamy właśnie na Ciebie. 

Na uczestników czekają nagrody!

Napisz do mnie w wiadomości prywatnej, a opowiem o szczegółach.

Zuza

items.text:
Do kolejnych odcinków serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

1. Mężczyzna 1 (27) – kryminalista. Dobrze zbudowany. 
Data: 03. lipca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

2. Beniek (28) – Gangus poszukiwany listem gończym. Typ ryzykanta, który najpierw działa, potem myśli. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY !!!
Data: 02. lipca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

3. Dawid Górecki (35) – złodziej samochodów. W dobrej formie, opanowany, rozsądny.  KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY !!!
Data: 02. lipca
Stawka: 600 zł netto 

4. Dawid Kowara (37) – bandyta średniego szczebla, trochę mniej bystry. Silny, przypakowany. Lubi przestępcze życie, zawsze chętny do działania więc ma sporo za uszami, ale poza odsiedzianym wyrokiem 3 lata za wymuszenie nic mu nie udowodniono.  
Data: 29. i 30. czerwca
Stawka: 1400 zł za całość 

5. Albert Moński (39) – bandyta średniego szczebla, dość przenikliwy, zdecydowany w działaniu. Sprawny fizycznie ale nie kafar. W przeszłości dostał 5 lat za rozbój. W więzieniu bardzo się wycwanił, dlatego po wyjściu nic mu już nigdy nie udowodniono. Energiczny w zachowaniu (pada w tekście). KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY !!!
Data: 29. i 30. czerwca
Stawka: 1400 zł za całość 

6. Mężczyzna 2 (40) – sprawny fizycznie.
Data: 03. lipca
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

sharedPost.text:
AUDITION NOTICE: East London

If fate handed you an inventory slot, what would you grab? A prop sword, a healing potion, or studio lights to bathe you mates?

This October, JDG presents a charity spectacular built around Master Jonjon's inventive new play: "Game Fillet Game: A Dive into Influencing Careers… Uninvented Jobs… Surprise Missions…". Find out what the story's about: cutt.ly/GFGstory

But here's the glorious part: you can be in it. Sign up: cutt.ly/GFGsignup

Starting early July, we're throwing open the doors to free masterclass workshop rehearsals. Whether you're a seasoned pro or trying something new, you belong here. Wander between departments, crash other people's workshops, build your showreel, learn something new, and meet other drama enthusiasts.

Backstage and cast roles are open. We're hunting for:
Director
Assistant Director
Stage Manager
Assistant Stage Manager
Designer
Sound Designer
Multimedia Designer
Multimedia Operator
Lighting Designer
Lighting Tech
Costume Designer
Props Designer
Set Designer
Front of House Manager
Assistant Front of House Manager
Director of Photography (Photography & Video Recording)

Sign up for your audition: cutt.ly/GFGsignup

The spotlight's on. Let the magic begin.

.

.

#londonevents #auditions #auditioning #thingstodoinlondon #londonplay #eastlondondrama #theatrelondon #londonperformance #eastlondontheatre #eastlondonplays #londontheatre

🎬 Across Cultures Film Festival — Official Announcement
We are excited to introduce the first edition of Across Cultures Film Festival, taking place in Bamberg, Germany on July 25, 2026.
A curated one-day event focused on powerful short films exploring identity, migration, and human connection across cultures.
✨ We are currently gathering interest from filmmakers worldwide.  
you can submit here:
https://filmfreeway.com/acrossculturesfilm

items.text:
CASTING CALL - **PAID ROLE** for FEMALE ACTOR / MODEL

Music Video

Date: 1 day between the dates of 21 June 2026 - 27 June 2026 (flexible)

I am looking for an actress/model for my music video for a song I will release at the beginning of July. As the song is unreleased, I will send it once I have selected an actress.

**DETAILS:**

Female - 25-35 years old - Open to all looks - Please see actor requirements below

**Location**: Around Berlin (Warschauer Str., Mitte, Kreuzberg)

**Date**: 1 day between the dates of 21 June 2026 - 27 June 2026 (flexible)

**Duration**: 1 day shoot of 5-6 hours, it will be a “run and gun” style shoot. I will have every shot planned and plan to move quickly.

**Pay**: **€4**0 flat fee, drinks and snacks provided throughout shoot

The video will be on YouTube and I will be using it for short form videos on Insta/TT/Threads etc. I can also send you a high quality copy once it is completed. 

**ACTOR DEMEANOR / REQUIREMENTS:**

The video will follow a woman who is simply enjoying living and the little things on a normal day. The actress must casually portray independence and self-appreciation with every step. The video will be following her throughout her day as she enjoys the weather, walking around Berlin, riding the subway, sitting by the canal/Spree drinking wine/coffee, reading a book, listening to music, etc. She will be speaking some of the lyrics throughout the video, but not performing them. She will say them as if she is thinking positively and talking to herself with a smirk.

The song is called “Learned That Day” and is about how someone had an intense experience in a relationship that fell apart. But she has persevered and found herself to be more capable than ever.

Here is a video I released in March. [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oA-zzkNhJT8&list=RDoA-zzkNhJT8&start_radio=1&pp=ygUPcGhpbGJldHRlcmJlYXRzoAcB](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oA-zzkNhJT8&list=RDoA-zzkNhJT8&start_radio=1&pp=ygUPcGhpbGJldHRlcmJlYXRzoAcB)

However, the video for "Learned That Day” will have a more casual vibe with no direct performance shots.

Please email headshots, Instagram handle, and a reel if you have one to the email below. Feel free to send any questions if you have them.

CONTACT: 

Email: philbettermusic@gmail.com

Instagram: @PhilBetter

Thank you and have a great week!

Philip / PhilBetter
